hotels.description_en:
Hotel Los Tambos Boutique is an elegant hotel in Arequipa, a city constructed entirely from white volcanic rock.  It offers a rooftop terrace with views of Misti Volcano and adventure sports excursions.
The front desk at Hotel Los Tambos Boutique can arrange a 2-day regional mountain bike tour, or rafting on Chili River.  Guests can visit the Andean Sanctuaries Museum, or relax with a coca tea in front of the cosy fireplace.
Rooms at Hotel Los Tambos Boutique have brown tiled floors with large floodlit windows and patterned bedding.    All are equipped with LCD and cable TV and free Wi-Fi.  Some have a king-size bed.
An American breakfast with fruit salad, bread rolls and eggs cooked to order is served daily.
